fields.title: E-Commerce Platform Modernisation
fields.short_description: Migrated a high-traffic retail store from a legacy PHP monolith to a modern React and Django stack, cutting page load times by 60%.
fields.description: The client operated a growing e-commerce store built on an aging PHP codebase that had become difficult to maintain and scale. Accetraa Technologies led a full modernisation: a React SPA for the storefront, a Django REST API for the backend, and MySQL on AWS RDS. The new system handled 3x the previous peak traffic without performance degradation.

fields.title: Real Estate Listing Portal
fields.short_description: A full-featured property listing platform with advanced search, map integration, agent dashboards, and lead capture for a regional real estate group.
fields.description: Built a multi-tenant property portal with role-based dashboards for agents, branch managers, and administrators. Features include advanced property search with map view, enquiry management, and automated email notifications. The platform launched with 500+ listings and onboarded 30 agents at go-live.
fields.technologies: Next.js, Django REST Framework, PostgreSQL, Google Maps API

fields.title: Salon Booking Mobile App
fields.short_description: A cross-platform mobile application for customers to browse services, book appointments, receive reminders, and pay in-app — integrated with the UrSaloon platform.
fields.description: Designed and developed the customer-facing mobile application for the UrSaloon ecosystem. Built with React Native for iOS and Android from a single codebase. Key features: service catalogue browsing, real-time slot availability, push notifications for reminders, in-app payments via Razorpay, and loyalty points tracking.
fields.technologies: React Native, Django REST Framework, Razorpay, Firebase

fields.title: Field Sales Tracking App
fields.short_description: A GPS-enabled mobile app for tracking field sales representatives, logging customer visits, managing leads, and generating territory performance reports.
fields.description: Developed a Flutter-based field sales management app used by a FMCG distributor with 200+ field agents. Agents log customer visits with geo-tagged check-ins, record orders and feedback, and sync data offline. Managers view real-time dashboards showing visit heatmaps, sales pipelines, and agent productivity metrics.
fields.technologies: Flutter, Django, MySQL, Google Maps, AWS S3

fields.title: Demand Forecasting Engine
fields.short_description: An ML-powered forecasting system predicting 90-day product demand for a retail chain, reducing overstock by 35% and stockouts by 28%.
fields.description: Built a machine learning forecasting pipeline for a retail chain with 80 SKUs and 15 store locations. The system processes historical sales data, promotional calendars, and seasonal patterns using an XGBoost ensemble model. Predictions are surfaced via a Django REST API integrated into the client's existing ERP. Deployed on AWS SageMaker.
fields.technologies: Python, XGBoost, AWS SageMaker, Django REST Framework, MySQL

fields.title: Customer Support AI Chatbot
fields.short_description: A context-aware AI chatbot trained on product documentation and FAQs, resolving 70% of support tickets without human intervention for a SaaS company.
fields.description: Designed and deployed a conversational AI chatbot for a B2B SaaS company's customer support team. The chatbot is powered by a fine-tuned language model with retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) over the client's knowledge base. It integrates with Zendesk for ticket escalation and CRM for account-aware responses. The system handles 500+ conversations per day.
fields.technologies: Python, LangChain, OpenAI API, Pinecone, Django, Zendesk API

fields.title: HR & Payroll Management System
fields.short_description: An end-to-end HRMS covering employee lifecycle, attendance, payroll processing, and statutory compliance for a manufacturing company with 1,200 employees.
fields.description: Delivered a bespoke HRMS for a mid-sized manufacturing enterprise. The system manages the complete employee lifecycle from onboarding to separation, biometric attendance integration, automated payroll with PF/ESI/TDS calculations, and a self-service employee portal for leave applications and payslip access. Built on Django with a React frontend.
fields.technologies: React, Django, MySQL, Celery, AWS EC2, Biometric SDK

fields.title: Logistics & Fleet Management Platform
fields.short_description: A real-time fleet tracking and logistics platform coordinating 300+ vehicles, optimising delivery routes, and automating proof-of-delivery.
fields.description: Built a web-based logistics platform for a regional courier company managing 300 vehicles across 5 cities. The platform provides real-time GPS tracking via IoT device integration, automated route optimisation using Google OR-Tools, a driver mobile app for delivery confirmation, and executive dashboards for KPI monitoring. Processes 2,000+ deliveries per day.
fields.technologies: React, Django, MySQL, Google OR-Tools, WebSockets, AWS IoT
